manifest.name: Cursor Location

name: Cursor Location

releases.author: spslater
releases.description:
Marking as version 1.0.0 because there isn't any other features I want to add. Will continue maintaining and fixing any bugs that pop up in the future. Feel free to submit any feature requests if there is something you'd like and I will consider if I think it's in the scope of the plugin.

## What's Changed
* Fixed typescript bug by @dsynkd in https://github.com/spslater/obsidian-cursor-location-plugin/pull/24

## New Contributors
* @dsynkd made their first contribution in https://github.com/spslater/obsidian-cursor-location-plugin/pull/24

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/spslater/obsidian-cursor-location-plugin/compare/0.3.2...1.0.0

releases.author: spslater
releases.description:
v0.2.0 - Update to CodeMirror 6 and house cleaning

- Update to CodeMirror 6
- Split into multiple typescript files
- Min App Version 1.1.1
- Mark as Desktop Only because mobile apps don't support custom
    status bar items
releases.name: 12 New Editor Version (#13)
